reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Pasamos en un viaje, los baños un asco, sin agua... y los domingos en la playa no te permiten cargar combustible con tarjeta ( débito o credito) solo efectivo...

(Translated by Google)
We spent a trip there, the bathrooms were disgusting, no water... and on Sundays at the beach they don't allow you to pay for fuel with a card (debit or credit), only cash...

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio al paso, y abierta las 24 hs del dia. la estacion en general es un ACA de antaño, bastante vieja, y los baños muy descuidados. los precios del shop estan bastante inflados, pero con un buen surtido de cosas. imposible comer salvo sandwich de miga o de milanesas elaborados localmente. El shop ofrece, ademas, buena varidad de respuetos livianos y accesorios para el automotor (escobillas, lamparas, cables pasa corriente, balizas, etc). ofrecen todos los descuentos de la franquicia, hay algunos inconvenientes con el uso del APP de YPF. El aire generalmente esta roto por el mismo maltrato de los usuarios. se podria mejorar, mas siendo una estacion de servicio con la marca ACA

(Translated by Google)
A 24-hour drive-through gas station. The station is essentially an old-fashioned ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) station, quite dated, and the restrooms are very neglected. The convenience store prices are rather inflated, but it has a decent selection of items. It's impossible to find anything to eat except for locally made sandwiches or breaded cutlets. The store also offers a good variety of spare parts and automotive accessories (wiper blades, bulbs, jumper cables, hazard lights, etc.). They offer all the franchise discounts, but there are some issues with using the YPF app. The air conditioning is often broken due to rough handling by customers. It could be improved, especially since it's an ACA-branded gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNlktenl3RRAB
